landing.badge: Built on Stellar · Soroban smart contracts
landing.heroTitle: Prove your liquidity is <1>locked</1> — without asking for trust
landing.heroDesc: StellarLock lets projects lock tokens and LP positions in immutable on-chain contracts, then share a public, verifiable page so their community knows they can't rug.
landing.problemTitle: Rug pulls happen when teams can pull liquidity. So remove the option.
landing.problemDesc: When liquidity and team tokens are locked in a contract no one can withdraw early, the single biggest rug-pull vector disappears. StellarLock makes that lock public and shareable.
landing.featureTokenDesc: Lock allocations with a fixed unlock date or a linear vesting schedule. Extend anytime — never shorten.
landing.featureLpDesc: Lock Aquarius and Soroswap pool shares so traders know the liquidity floor stays put.
landing.featureExplorerDesc: Every lock gets a shareable page showing amounts, beneficiaries, and unlock dates — verifiable by anyone.
landing.stepLockDesc: Connect your wallet, choose a token or LP position, set the amount and unlock date, and sign one transaction.
landing.stepEnforceDesc: The Soroban contract holds the funds. No one — not even you — can withdraw before the unlock timestamp.
landing.stepShareDesc: Drop your public explorer link in your README or Telegram. Your community verifies the lock themselves.
landing.ctaTitle: Earn your community's trust in one transaction
landing.ctaDesc: Lock your liquidity, share the proof, and let the chain speak for you.

createLock.title: Create a lock
createLock.subtitle: Lock tokens or LP positions in an immutable Soroban contract.

tokenForm.tokenHint: The Soroban contract address of the token you want to lock.
tokenForm.beneficiaryHint: Who can withdraw once unlocked. Defaults to your address.
tokenForm.vestingDesc: Release gradually from now until the unlock date, instead of all at once.
tokenForm.lockInfo: Locks are immutable: you can extend the unlock date later, but never shorten it.
tokenForm.metadataDesc: Shown on the lock's detail and explorer pages so your community can verify who locked this.

lpForm.poolHint: The contract address of your {{dex}} pool share token.
lpForm.lockInfo: Locking LP shares signals to traders that the liquidity floor is protected.

myLocks.title: My Locks
myLocks.subtitle: Manage and withdraw your locked positions.
myLocks.noLocksCreatedDesc: Create your first lock to prove your tokens or liquidity are secured.
myLocks.noBeneficiary: No locks where you're the beneficiary
myLocks.noBeneficiaryDesc: Locks created for you by others will appear here.

lockDetail.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find a lock with id #{{id}}.
lockDetail.creator: Creator
lockDetail.extendHint: Must be later than the current unlock date. Locks can only be extended, never shortened.
lockDetail.securityNotice: These tokens are secured by the StellarLock contract until the unlock date. Neither the creator nor StellarLock can move them early.

explorer.shareDesc: Embed this badge in your README, website, or Telegram. Anyone can click through to this page and independently verify that liquidity is locked — no trust required.
explorer.noLocksDesc: We couldn't find any locks for <1>{{query}}</1>. Double-check the token symbol or contract address, or create the first lock for this token.

search.placeholder: Search a token by symbol or contract address…

connectGate.title: Connect your wallet
connectGate.desc: Connect a Stellar wallet to continue.

history.title: Transaction History
history.subtitle: Every lock transaction you've submitted from this browser, with live status.
history.emptyDesc: Create, withdraw, or extend a lock and it'll show up here.
